name: agent-loop-designer
description: Turn `$agent-loop-designer <thing I keep doing>` into a reusable Codex loop with WSL-aware worktree fan-out by default.

interface.shortDescription: Make recurring Codex work repeatable from one simple command.
interface.longDescription: Agent Loop Designer lets you type `$agent-loop-designer <describe the thing I keep doing>` and turns that recurring work into an executable loop. Independent candidates and code-editing work default to separate worktree-backed threads; in WSL, it prefers manual Linux-native git worktrees under $HOME/codex-worktrees instead of Codex-managed worktrees on Windows storage. It includes `$architecture-cascade` for running improve-codebase-architecture once, creating candidate worktree-backed threads, and acting on safe candidates automatically in isolated worktrees. Durable loops include a failure-learning rule so repeat failures caused by this plugin feed back into skill or reference updates.
